hook: People often ghost to avoid discomfort, not because your worth needs explaining.
body: Their avoidance may still be inconsiderate, but it does not require you to turn the event into a verdict on yourself.

hook: Personalizing every disappearance can push you toward bitterness faster than wisdom.
body: Their behavior tells you something meaningful about their capacity, not just your desirability.

hook: Their behavior tells you something meaningful about their capacity, not just your desirability.
body: A person who cannot send a simple no may not be equipped for the kind of clarity you actually want anyway.

hook: A person who cannot send a simple no may not be equipped for the kind of clarity you actually want anyway.
body: Use ghosting as a filter for maturity rather than as evidence that you were not enough.
